response.overview: Trapped within her own body, at the heart of a frenetic industry of violence, the protagonist seeks to protect herself.  An ode to the memory of the traces left behind, YOU ARE MEATLESS celebrates with both violence and tenderness the abandoned body, the weary body, the bewildered body, the cherished body. Experimentally blending video, poetry, and performance, this short film invites viewers to reflect on the value of our bodies in an industry of rape.
response.title: You are Meat
